input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.4.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.4.1.1
            TITLE: any command flag must be obeyed immediately and without question.

            CONTENT:
            rule D.4.1.1: Any Command Flag must be obeyed immediately and without question.
D.4.1.1 Any Command Flag must be obeyed immediately and without question.

final_answer: rule D.4.1.1: Any Command Flag must be obeyed immediately and without question.
